mapper.select:
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD
AND MENU_ID = #{ menu_id }
AND ${searchType} Like '%' || #{ keyword } || '%'
ORDER BY IDX DESC OFFSET #{ offset } ROWS FETCH NEXT #{ numOfRows } ROWS ONLY
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE IDX = ${idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(IDX),0)+1 FROM BOARD), #{menu_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer} )
